recommended_choice.development_environment: Windows-friendly Python virtual environment. Also compatible with macOS/Linux.
recommended_choice.reasoning: Because the founder may use a Windows Surface, local Streamlit + DuckDB avoids cloud cost and deployment complexity while remaining portable.

stack.processing: Pandas; optional Polars for large files

local_architecture.component: DuckDB connection helpers and SQL query functions.
Pulls USAspending data into raw CSV/Parquet; not called by dashboard.
Pulls SAM opportunities into raw CSV/Parquet; not called by dashboard.

security_guidance.rule: Commit sample data only; gitignore raw API pulls and local DuckDB files.
Store SAM_API_KEY in environment variable, not in source code.
Use local config for scoring weights; do not store sensitive personal notes in a public repo.

technical_architecture.suggested_repository_tree: govcon-partner-radar/ app.py README.md requirements.txt .gitignore .env.example config/ agencies.yml keywords.yml scoring_weights.yml data/ sample/ agencies.csv vendors.csv awards.csv opportunities.csv contract_vehicles.csv capture_notes.csv raw/ # gitignored processed/ # gitignored scripts/ build_db.py ingest_usaspending.py ingest_sam.py src/ db.py scoring.py transforms.py exports.py charts.py pages/ 1_Executive_Overview.py 2_Agency_Spending_Explorer.py 3_Prime_Contractor_Intelligence.py 4_Recompete_Tracker.py 5_Partner_Radar.py 6_Opportunity_Tracker.py 7_Capture_Log.py

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Ingestion scripts can be run independently and scheduled locally.
Application starts with sample data without requiring API credentials.
